items.prompt: At a fixed width, binary, hex, and unsigned decimal are best thought of as…
choices: Different spellings of the same bit pattern
items.explain: They are views of one fixed-width bit pattern.

items.prompt: At width 8, the all-ones pattern (0xFF) as two’s-complement signed is…
items.explain: All ones in two’s complement is −1; unsigned reading is 255.

items.prompt: Changing bit width can change the meaning of a pattern even if the digits you typed look the same.
items.explain: Width is a hard budget; the same hex text may not mean the same bits after a width change.

items.prompt: A good workbook check after the browser lab is…
choices: Convert one value by hand (binary / hex / decimal) and name a pitfall
Skip paper because the UI always ships with chips
items.explain: Track A hardens the idea without UI crutches.
